name: Boxfire Agent Toolkit

hierarchy.note: Operates beneath Universal Horizon. No host required for standalone operation.

description: Boxfire's five callable agents: Scout (file inspection), Probe (endpoint health), Route (member selection), Witness (ledger append), Audit (18-endpoint batch suite). Each agent runs independently. Audit requires a running server for endpoint checks.
standaloneInterface: ES module — import { scout, probe, route, witness, audit } from './boxfire-agents.mjs'

agents.description: Reads file stats, exports, imports, line count for a target path
Hits a single endpoint, returns ok/status/latencyMs/body/error
agents.note: Degrades gracefully when server absent — returns ok: false

agents.description: Deterministic keyword → { room, member, rationale, matchScore }. Does not call any AI.
Appends a hearthfire.action/v1 entry to data/action-ledger.jsonl
Runs 18 standard probes in batches of 4, returns summary. Writes ledger entry.
agents.note: Probe calls degrade gracefully when server absent

stopRestart.stop: No persistent process — module is a library
stopRestart.stateRecovery: Ledger is append-only; state survives process exit

importExport.import: Append compatible JSONL entries to data/action-ledger.jsonl

moduleLaw: No hard dependency on any other module. Route agent uses keyword table pending Codex integration.
pendingItems: Route agent: keyword table → Codex-aware routing (blocked on Codex Hub source)
